title: Audit existing MCP TypeScript implementation

context.objective: Document current MCP client capabilities in TypeScript UI layer and identify gaps vs moltis-mcp
context.background: A2R has a TypeScript MCP client using @ai-sdk/mcp. We need to port/adapt this to Rust backend (tools-gateway).

outputs.description: Current MCP implementation capabilities and gaps

acceptance_criteria: List all MCP features in TypeScript implementation
Map TypeScript types to proposed Rust types
